analysis: The project is a static website about black holes with existing HTML, CSS, and JavaScript files. The theme needs to be enhanced with a cosmic black hole aesthetic, including animated slides and interactive elements. The current CSS file has some SVG patterns and animations, but they need to be completed and refined to fully capture the black hole theme. The HTML file should include sections for black hole information, and the JavaScript file should handle animations and interactions.

improvements.description: Complete the CSS file with a full dark, cosmic theme including animations for black hole visuals, swirling effects, and glowing elements. Ensure all SVG data URLs are properly formatted and include Egyptian-themed patterns.

Complete the HTML content to ensure all sections are properly included, such as the main content area with interactive planets, animated slides, and other sections related to black holes. Add a mobile-friendly navigation menu with a hamburger icon for better usability on mobile devices.

Complete the JavaScript content to ensure all buttons have proper event handlers and functionality. Fix syntax errors in the showSlide function and ensure all functions are properly implemented. Add event listeners and functionality for the new buttons added in test-website/index.html.
